translation.Welcome: Welcome to DevEco Insight. Select a device and process to start.
translation.TimeDescribe: Sample the running of ArkTS/JS/C++ functions to quickly locate time-consuming functions
translation.AllocationsDescribe: Trace the memory allocation of ArkTS/JS/C++ objects and analyze the memory overhead at runtime to detect memory leak
translation.SnapshotDescribe: Snapshot profiles show memory distribution among your application's ArkTS objects
translation.CPUDescribe: Trace CPU core scheduling details and ArkTS and native code running performance at the system level
translation.FrameDescribe: Record the rendering data on a frame-by-frame basis to auto-identify frozen frames, and gain access to CPU scheduling and function stack sampling data in the same period of time.
translation.LimitWarn: Warn : {{name}} exceed the limit , Only display the first {{maxSize}} .

error.4001: Are you sure you want to delete the session?
error.4002: Select a device and process first.
error.4005: At least one unit must be configured.

notify.5002: Cannot start a new session during recording.
notify.5003: Unable to start DevEco Insight. Restart or reinstall the app.
notify.5005: Cannot switch to another session during recording.
notify.5006: Stop the active session and try again.
notify.5008: Unsupported API version: {{apiVersion}}. The minimum supported API version is {{minVersion}}.
notify.5010: Failed to open insight data file. Unsupported file version.
notify.5011: Insufficient storage space. Make sure the available space is 1 GB or larger.
notify.5012: This recording session has lasted more than 5 minutes. To avoid possible parsing errors, stop the session and start a new one.

deviceAndProcess.6001: Make sure the target device is connected.
deviceAndProcess.6002: Make sure the target process is running correctly.

headerButtonTooltip.Title: Select profiling type
headerButtonTooltip.AllocationDescribe: Record stack traces of allocations（extra performance overhead）
headerButtonTooltip.FilterSizeDescribe: Please enter a proper value between 1024 Bytes and 10 MB.
headerButtonTooltip.StackDepthDescribe: Please enter a proper value between 5 and 100.
headerButtonTooltip.TimeStampOffset: Please enter a proper value within 30 days.

timelineMarker.guide: Click the timeline to add a marker.
timelineMarker.markerDiff: Time difference between HoverMarker and SelectMarker
timelineMarker.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to delete all markers?

deviceNotify.apiSupported: This feature is available to devices of API version {{msg}} or later.
deviceNotify.versionSupported: This feature is available to devices running {{msg}} or a later system version.

laneNotify.frameNoRenderService: No rendering data available. Turn on the device screen for the Render Service to properly render frames.

chart.switchTooltip: Click to Switch Chart Display and Hide
